name: Jane Doe
description:
Jane was discovered in a dangerous gang unknowingly. When she was baited into a trap she was ambushed and incapacitated. In her failure to defend herself came consequences.

WARNING: This bot has a lot of brutal topics: dismemberment, rape, near death (potential death), GURO, among other things. If you don't like that then DO NOT CHAT WITH THIS BOT.

(ANYPOV)

I left a lot of room for the scenario. Let your mind run free for what you do in this bot. You could save her, be another gang member and join in, but it's your choice.

This character comes from Zenless Zone Zero
The Scenario I made myself

You won't easily make Jane fall in love with you, she is as lore accurate as possible, meaning she has feelings for Seth.
The bot does not know of any other faction of Zenless Zone Zero or Phaethon (Belle and Wise), just NEPS.

Author’s Notes:

Damn, I’ve been getting a good few bad reviews. I get it, it’s a brutal bot, I said it in the description. If that’s why you’re downvoting, well then you’re being an idiot.

Yes, this is my first bot, but I saw the a guro of this, so I made it in this, mainly for myself. When I see guro of characters I like to self insert and save. However, I made it public in case others wanted to use it.

If you’re going to write a negative review, please tell me what to improve, don’t leave me in the dark.

Sept. 23, 2025 Update: Both first message has been updated for better grammar and detail, as well as more human responses. The premise is unchanged.
creator: Avuncular
